attributes.description: Queues, topics, message flow, and destination-level errors.

params.markdown:
## [ActiveMQ OTel] Destinations & Message Flow

Queues, topics, and message flow:
- Total queue depth, consumers, producers
- Queue depth, enqueue/dequeue rate by destination
- Message wait time, inflight messages
- DLQ depth, expired messages, blocked sends

query.esql:
FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS depth_per_dest = MAX(activemq.message.current) BY dest
| STATS total_depth = SUM(depth_per_dest)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS depth_per_dest = MAX(activemq.message.current) BY dest
| STATS total_depth = SUM(depth_per_dest)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.consumer.count IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS consumers = SUM(activemq.consumer.count)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.consumer.count IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS consumers = SUM(activemq.consumer.count)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.producer.count IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS producers = SUM(activemq.producer.count)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.producer.count IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS producers = SUM(activemq.producer.count)

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS depth = AVG(activemq.message.current) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS depth = AVG(activemq.message.current) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Queue Depth Over Time by Destination

query.esql:
TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.enqueued IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS enqueue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.message.enqueued)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.enqueued IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS enqueue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.message.enqueued)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.dequeued IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS dequeue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.message.dequeued)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.dequeued IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS dequeue_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.message.dequeued)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.wait_time.avg IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS wait_ms = AVG(activemq.message.wait_time.avg) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.wait_time.avg IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS wait_ms = AVG(activemq.message.wait_time.avg) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.queue.message.inflight IS NOT NULL OR activemq.topic.message.inflight IS NOT NULL
| EVAL inflight = COALESCE(activemq.queue.message.inflight, 0) + COALESCE(activemq.topic.message.inflight, 0)
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS inflight = AVG(inflight) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.queue.message.inflight IS NOT NULL OR activemq.topic.message.inflight IS NOT NULL
| EVAL inflight = COALESCE(activemq.queue.message.inflight, 0) + COALESCE(activemq.topic.message.inflight, 0)
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS inflight = AVG(inflight) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest == "ActiveMQ.DLQ"
| STATS dlq_depth = AVG(activemq.message.current) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest == "ActiveMQ.DLQ"
| STATS dlq_depth = AVG(activemq.message.current) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.expired IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS expired_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.message.expired)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.expired IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS expired_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.message.expired)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.queue.blocked.sends IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS blocked_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.queue.blocked.sends)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.queue.blocked.sends IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS blocked_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.queue.blocked.sends)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), dest
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS queue_depth = MAX(activemq.message.current) BY dest
| SORT queue_depth DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS queue_depth = MAX(activemq.message.current) BY dest
| SORT queue_depth DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.destination.type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(dest) BY activemq.destination.type
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.destination.type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL dest = COALESCE(activemq.destination.name, messaging.destination.name)
| WHERE dest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (dest LIKE "ActiveMQ.Advisory*")
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(dest) BY activemq.destination.type
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

attributes.title: [ActiveMQ OTel] Destinations & Message Flow
